title: Monthstarter: Signal Sniper
objective: Survive all 9 months of a 3-minute production sprint by tapping only the items that are valid to start right now, building combo momentum while avoiding false starts, stale tasks, and panic pivots.

controls.input: Single tap on a glowing card, icon, or stamp
controls.outcome: Starts the right work, scores points, and raises combo

controls.input: Do not tap crossed-out or dimmed items
controls.outcome: Avoids false starts and preserves lives

controls.input: Watch the top banner and tap the newly highlighted target type
controls.outcome: Adapts to the surprise twist and keeps the run alive

steps: Each run covers 9 months, shown as fast mini-rounds with a large month badge and a clear target rule at the top such as START PROTOTYPES or
Crowded cards slide, overlap, and rotate onto the board: prototypes, art passes, bug fixes, trailers, feedback notes, and milestone stamps.
Only valid start targets glow with a sharp outline, pulse to the beat, and use the current month color; invalid cards are visibly muted or X
Tap valid starts quickly to chain a combo multiplier; missing too many valid starts lets momentum decay.
Every few seconds, a Retrospective Alert changes the rule for a short burst, for example from START NEW IDEAS to START FIXES ONLY; the whole
scene recolors, a voice sting plays, and valid targets swap immediately, forcing a rapid decision change.
Later months add denser clutter, decoy cards that look nearly ready, and split-second windows where already-started tasks become forbidden.
You fail after 3 false starts or if the monthly momentum meter empties from too many misses before Month 9 ends.
scoring: Valid taps score base points plus a rising combo multiplier. Perfectly surviving a month grants a Month Clear bonus. A simple offline local leaderboard tracks highest total score and longest combo.
tips: Read the top banner first; the rule is always explicit before targets spawn.
Follow the glow plus audio ping, not the card art alone.
During Retrospective Alerts, slow down for half a beat; the valid target family has changed.
Protect combo in late months by ignoring borderline decoys.

trendContext.title: 9 Months ago we started our hobby game project. How can we improve?
